commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Neither shall you lie with any animal to defile yourself with it: neither shall any woman stand before an animal to lie down with it: it is perversion. Hebrew, "confusion. "The Egyptians did so with goats, as part of their religion. We need not, however, infer from this law, that the crime was common among the Jews, as Voltaire would insinuate. (Haydock) Nothing but monsters can proceed from such wickedness. (Menochius).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Because it is a heinous crime: In Hebrew, this word heinous crime is expressed by the word confusion, signifying the shamefulness and baseness of this abominable sin.
